name: Gray v. Wilkie
question: Does the US Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit have jurisdiction to review an interpretive rule by the Department of Veterans Affairs promulgated through a revision of its adjudication manual?
description: A case in which the Court was asked to decide whether the US Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit has jurisdiction under 38 U.S.C. § 502 to review an interpretive rule reflecting the Department of Veterans Affairs’ definitive interpretation of its own regulation, even if the VA chooses to promulgate that rule through its adjudication manual.
